description_long: This is a single black flip-flop sandal featuring a wide, textured strap that arches over the foot and connects between the toes. The footbed is primarily black with subtle horizontal stripes in shades of blue and gray, adding a touch of visual interest. The sole appears to be made of a durable, slightly textured rubber, with a thin blue accent running along the side. The strap is likely made of synthetic material with a fine-grained texture for grip and comfort. The overall design is casual and functional, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or beaches. There is a small gold logo printed on the heel area of the footbed, indicating a possible brand mark.
description: A black flip-flop sandal with a wide textured strap, striped footbed, and blue accent on the sole. Features a gold logo on the heel.
description_view_0: The sandal is seen from an angled side view, highlighting the wide black strap, blue accent on the sole, and striped footbed.
description_view_1: This front-angled view emphasizes the toe post and the striped pattern near the front of the footbed.
description_view_2: The rear side view shows the arch of the strap and the gold logo on the heel, with the blue accent visible along the sole.
description_view_3: A back-angled view focusing on the heel area, gold logo, and the curvature of the strap.
attribute_logo: gold printed logo on the heel area of the footbed
